title: Post-Pilot
tagline: Multi-platform social media automation for creators and small businesses.
description: Post-Pilot is a content distribution automation tool that pushes a single post to multiple social platforms simultaneously — Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and more — with scheduling, caption variants, and a web dashboard.
story: Built out of frustration after manually cross-posting the same content to four platforms every day. The problem wasn't creativity — it was repetition. Post-Pilot eliminates the repetition and lets you focus on the content.
forWho: Creators, small business owners, and social media managers who publish to multiple platforms and want to manage it from one place.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Flask web app with a per-platform adapter pattern. Each platform (Meta, Twitter) has its own publisher class with a common interface.
keyPatterns: APScheduler for deferred and recurring posts
OAuth2 token management per connected account
Caption variant system for A/B testing copy
